---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about how Vedana works or how to use it
title: "[question] "
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

> 👀 Before filing — please check whether your question is answered in:
>
> - the [documentation](https://vedana.tech/docs/) (and especially the [FAQ](https://vedana.tech/docs/product/faq/) and [Troubleshooting](https://vedana.tech/docs/operations/troubleshooting/)),
> - existing [issues](https://github.com/epoch8/vedana/issues?q=is%3Aissue) and [discussions](https://github.com/epoch8/vedana/discussions).
>
> If it's an open-ended question (best practices, design choices, "how would you approach X?") — please use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/epoch8/vedana/discussions) instead of an issue.
